title: Amtech S5925 6 Piece M8 x 60mm expansion bolts
features: HEAVY DUTY: These heavy duty M8 x 60mm expansion bolts have a zinc passivated finish for maximum protection
VERSATILE: Suitable for fixing concrete, stone and brickwork, they have many applications, including ladder restraints, light fixings, safety chains, barriers and shelving
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Amtech S5925 8 x 60 mm Expansion Bolts (6-Piece) Rawl bolt type expansion bolts Ideal fixings for concrete, stone and brickwork Heavy duty construction Many uses including ladder restraints, light fixings, safety chains, barriers, shelving etc About Us Amtech has been established in the DIY and Home Improvement sector for over thirty years. We manufacture and distribute both hand tools and power tools for the home, garage, and garden environments. Our Amtech brand and product proposition taps into key shopper purchase drivers, such as quality, value and range. We have over 60 DIY product categories to choose from and we continually evaluate industry insights and consumer trends, to ensure that we maximise category growth opportunities for our customers.
